story: Arrested for Lydia’s murder, Terry was taken to Interrogation Room #1 and cuffed to the table. Robert, a plainclothes investigator, entered carrying a worn briefcase. Inside were photos of Terry’s Ford Explorer and of Terry and Lydia embracing. Robert urged him to talk and began outlining the case: Lydia had been strangled and was three weeks pregnant. Terry was shaken.
implausible_knowledge: Inside were photos of Terry’s Ford Explorer and of Terry and Lydia embracing.
question: As Robert keeps pressing him for his side of the story at this point, what will Terry most plausibly do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Explain the photo merely showed their relationship and cannot serve as evidence.
answer_without_knowledge: Keep denying that he hurt Lydia and treat the situation like a misunderstanding that can still be explained away.
